title: The Architect
description: [Dialogue-based final encounter. The Architect converses with the character through character-specific dialogue sequences that vary by how many times the character has defeated the Architect.]

options.title: Continue/Respond
options.description: Advance to the next line of dialogue (button text varies based on who is speaking)

options.title: Proceed
options.description: Finish the conversation and complete your run

conditions: Post-encounter event (appears after defeating The Architect in combat)
Character-specific dialogue varies by character win count
notes: [gold]Dialogue-Based Event[/gold]: This event is a post-encounter conversation with The Architect following victory in combat. Each character has multiple unique dialogue paths (3-4 variations) that unlock based on how many times that character has won against The Architect. The dialogue advances line-by-line as the player clicks 'Continue' or 'Respond' (depending on who is speaking). Dialogue variants may include attacks: the player can attack The Architect, The Architect can attack the player, or both can attack each other, depending on the dialogue configuration. When the player attacks, damage is divided across multiple attack VFX using weighted randomization—one hit deals 2-3x normal damage, one hit deals 0.1-0.5x, and the remainder deal 0.7-1.3x normal damage. After all dialogue lines are exhausted, the player clicks 'Proceed' to finish the run and complete their victory.
